label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure out who Alice is dancing with at the end of the dance. There are five dancers mentioned: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them starts with a partner: Alice with Jamie, Bob with Patrick, Claire with Ophelia, Dave with Melissa, and Eve with Rodrigo. Now, there are a series of partner switches. Let me go through each one step by step. Maybe I should keep track of each person's partner after each switch. Let me list out the initial pairings first: 1. Alice - Jamie 2. Bob - Patrick 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Melissa 5. Eve - Rodrigo First switch: Dave and Bob switch partners. So Dave was with Melissa, Bob was with Patrick. After the switch, Dave will be with Patrick and Bob will be with Melissa. So after first switch: 1. Alice - Jamie 2. Bob - Melissa 3. Claire - Ophelia 4. Dave - Patrick 5. Eve - Rodrigo Second switch: Claire and Dave switch partners. Claire was with Ophelia, Dave was with Patrick. After the switch, Claire will be with Patrick and Dave will be with Ophelia. After second switch: 1. Alice - Jamie 2. Bob - Melissa 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Rodrigo Third switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve was with Rodrigo, Alice with Jamie. After the switch, Eve will be with Jamie and Alice will be with Rodrigo. After third switch: 1. Alice - Rodrigo 2. Bob - Melissa 3. Claire - Patrick 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Jamie Fourth switch: Claire and Eve switch partners. Claire is with Patrick, Eve is with Jamie. After the switch, Claire will be with Jamie and Eve will be with Patrick. After fourth switch: 1. Alice - Rodrigo 2. Bob - Melissa 3. Claire - Jamie 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Patrick Fifth switch: Alice and Eve switch partners. Alice is with Rodrigo, Eve with Patrick. After the switch, Alice will be with Patrick and Eve will be with Rodrigo. After fifth switch: 1. Alice - Patrick 2. Bob - Melissa 3. Claire - Jamie 4. Dave - Ophelia 5. Eve - Rodrigo So at the end of the dance, Alice is dancing with Patrick. The answer should be option (B) Patrick. Let me just verify my steps again to make sure I didn't make a mistake. First switch: Dave and Bob switch. So Dave (Melissa) with Bob (Patrick) → Dave-Patrick, Bob-Melissa. Correct. Second switch: Claire and Dave switch. Claire (Ophelia) with Dave (Patrick) → Claire-Patrick, Dave-Ophelia. Correct. Third switch: Eve and Alice
